description.value:
Send Medication prescription vma-geaccepteerd building blocks for patient K. XXX_Verbeekz
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 23.1a voorschrift t.b.v. VMA <span class="xforms-group xforms-group-appearance-full" id="main-ui"><span class="xforms-group" id="xf-103"><span class="fr-accordion-lnf xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡fr-accordion-group"><span class="xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡xf-177⊙16">TEST Scenarioset 23.1a voorschrift met NSAID t.b.v. 100% akkoord VMA met eerdere verstrekking​
Send Medication prescription vma-geaccepteerd resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where(category.coding.code = '33633005').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '8060') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '22276') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where(category.coding.code = '52711000146108').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '8060') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '22276') ))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '8060|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (DICLOFENAC-NATRIUM TABLET MSR 25MG)
